Packages that use microui.core
Package
Description
microui.component
 
microui.core
 
  • Classes in microui.core used by microui.component
    Class
    Description
    AbstractButton
    Abstract base class for all button-like components in the microui framework.
    ImageBuffer
    A spatial view component for displaying and manipulating images with color tinting.
    LinearRangeControl
    Abstract base class for linear range control components (sliders, scrollbars).
    RangeControl
    Abstract base class for range control components that allow selecting a numeric value within a specified range.
  • Classes in microui.core used by microui.core
    Class
    Description
    AbstractButton
    Abstract base class for all button-like components in the microui framework.
    BufferedView
    Abstract base class for views that render to an off-screen graphics buffer.
    RangeControl
    Abstract base class for range control components that allow selecting a numeric value within a specified range.
    TextEditorModel.Direction
    Provides constants for cursor direction
